# Output templates

Format templates for the artifacts the archetype agents promise. They are artifacts, not workflow: no tools, no scripts, just the shape of the deliverable. Knowledge-work agents reuse the same format templates as their code counterparts.

- `SPIKE_FINDINGS.md` — Prototyper
- `UNSHIP_LIST.md` — Sweeper
- `EXPERIMENT.md` — Grower
- `HEALTHCHECK.md` — Maintainer

Builder has no template: its artifact is the production slice plus shown verify output, which is already mechanical.
